focus: 读者体验和编辑完成度
evidence: 政治经济 主推《Russia jails former Kursk governor in Ukraine incursion-linked graft probe》
政治经济 副推《Russia jails former Kursk governor in Ukraine incursion-linked graft probe / Iran War Live Updates: Trump Renews Threat of Attacks on Bridges and Power Plants》
科技 主推《Artemis II astronauts break a record, name a crater》
科技 副推《Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline / The best deals on MacBooks right now》
体育娱乐 主推《Five takeaways from NCAA regionals -- and what they mean for nationals》
体育娱乐 副推《Sources: UNC to hire Malone as new hoops coach / Sky trade Reese to Dream for two 1st-rounders》
most_obvious_problems: 四个板块的主推开头冲击力仍不够统一，读者第一屏体验还不够利落
priority_improvements: 下轮先校对四个板块主推首句，再放行终稿
execution_link: 终稿结构和主推语气统一由我兜底
summary: neko 从读者体验和编辑完成度视角指出 1 个优先问题，并给出下一轮成品打磨建议。
